title: Smoke on the Horizon
description: Travelers report seeing a dragon circling the mountains near Kazer-Dun entrance. If true, this is catastrophic. The Guild needs someone to investigate - carefully. If it's really a dragon, don't engage. But if it's just a wyvern or drake, well... that's a trophy worth claiming.

objectives.description: Travel to Kazer-Dun entrance and investigate
Track the flying creature to its lair
Confirm it's a wyvern, not a dragon

notes: Rank: Elite. Major boss fight. Wyvern is extremely dangerous - recommend level 20+ and good equipment. Dragonscale shield is legendary-tier defensive item. Nest near Kazer-Dun entrance.
